name: CDN77 Content Delivery Network API
what_it_does: Global content delivery network with REST API — enabling developers to distribute static assets, software downloads, and video streams across 45+ PoPs worldwide, with HTTP/2, Brotli, and QUIC support, instant cache purging, custom SSL, raw log access, and streaming delivery for both VOD and live video content.
use_cases: Distributing static assets and software packages via CDN77 CDN resources via API
Purging cached content programmatically via CDN77 API for deployment and content update pipelines
Configuring CDN77 CDN resources with custom headers and cache rules via REST API
Delivering live and on-demand video via CDN77 streaming resources via API configuration
Querying CDN77 bandwidth statistics and traffic analytics via API for reporting
not_for: Edge compute (CDN77 is CDN only — no serverless edge functions)
Advanced WAF and DDoS mitigation (use Cloudflare for advanced security)
Complex enterprise CDN with dedicated account management requirements
best_when: A developer or media company needs a competitively priced CDN with strong video streaming capabilities and raw log access — especially for software distribution, large file delivery, or VOD/live streaming at scale.
avoid_when: You need edge compute, advanced security features, or enterprise SLA with dedicated support.

auth.notes: API token from CDN77 account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks. REST API v3 for CDN resource and storage management. HTTP/2, HTTP/3 (QUIC), Brotli support. Raw logs download via API. Streaming delivery for VOD and live video. Let's Encrypt and custom SSL. Object storage (CDN77 Storage) for origin. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day trial with $10 credit; no free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go from $0.049/GB (North America/Europe); volume discounts; minimum $29/month
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague). Founded 2011 by DataCamp (Czech ISP). Privately held. 45+ global PoPs. 35+ Tbps network capacity. Pay-as-you-go pricing. Known for transparent pricing and competitive rates. Strong in software distribution, gaming, and media/streaming. Raw log access (every request) included. Video streaming capabilities (live and VOD). CDN77 Storage as origin object storage. Used by game developers, software companies, and media platforms. Czech engineering culture with strong technical focus.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v3 for CDN resource management. API token bearer auth. Good technical documentation. No webhooks. Raw log download API for detailed access logs. Czech company with GDPR compliance. Rate limits not documented. Streaming CDN resource configuration separate from static delivery. Minimum $29/month regardless of usage.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: CDN resource reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by time range. Resource creation not idempotent — check by label. Cache purge is idempotent by URL.
known_agent_gotchas: Minimum $29/month — not truly pay-as-you-go at very low traffic
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency API operations
No webhooks — must poll for configuration and purge status
Streaming CDN resources (for video) have different configuration than static delivery resources
No credit card required at signup — use $10 trial credit to evaluate

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency. API token auth. Czech company with GDPR-first design. Raw log access (every request) enables detailed security auditing. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes — API token provides full account access. Custom SSL for zone domains. DDoS protection at CDN level. Raw logs contain user IP addresses — GDPR data retention policies apply.
